components.label:
📋 Requirement
(Work Item / Jira Story)
components.description: The starting point. A user story in Jira or Azure DevOps with acceptance criteria. The WorkItemMapper reads this and links components to test IDs.

components.label:
🤖 AI Engine
(ChatGPT / Copilot)
components.description: Receives structured prompts (System + Role + Chain-of-Thought + Output Schema) and generates a structured test case table. Output is validated against the 5-section checklist.

components.label:
🧪 Test Cases
(TC-REG-001 to TC-FP-006)
components.description: 14 structured test cases across Registration (8) and Forgot Password (6). Each has TC ID, priority, risk level, preconditions, steps, and expected results.

components.label:
📄 Page Object Model
(RegistrationPage, ForgotPasswordPage)
components.description: Page-specific classes that encapsulate locators and expose business-level action methods. All interactions delegate to BasePage for wait utilities and self-healing.

components.label:
🛡️ BasePage
(Self-Healing + Wait Utils)
components.description: Core infrastructure layer. find() calls the SelfHealingEngine. wait_for_visible() and wait_for_clickable() wrap WebDriverWait. Screenshots are managed via conftest hooks.

components.label:
🔧 Self-Healing Engine
(4-Layer Fallback)
components.description: Intercepts NoSuchElementException. Tries Primary → Fallback ID → CSS Selector → XPath. On success: promotes working locator to primary in config.json, logs the event to healing_log.json.

components.label:
📁 Locator Repository
(config.json)
components.description: Central JSON store for all locators with primary + fallback strategies. Updated automatically by the Self-Healing Engine. Single source of truth for all element locations.

components.label:
🌐 WebDriver
(Chrome / Edge)
components.description: Managed by conftest.py fixture. Auto-installs correct driver version via webdriver-manager. Supports headless mode for CI/CD. Teardown and screenshot-on-failure handled automatically.

components.label:
🖥️ Target Application
(Flask Portal — :5000)
components.description: The web application under test. Hosts Registration and Forgot Password forms. Supports break_locators mode for the self-healing demo.

components.label:
🔬 Regression Analyzer
(Risk-Based Selection)
components.description: Takes changed file list from git diff, maps to impacted test modules using defect heatmap, ranks by risk score, and outputs recommended pytest command.

components.label:
⚡ CI/CD Pipeline
(GitHub Actions / Azure DevOps)
components.description: Triggers on push, PR, schedule, and manual dispatch. Runs code quality checks, regression analysis, test execution, and publishes reports and screenshots as artifacts.

components.label:
📊 Reports & Screenshots
(pytest-html + Artifacts)
components.description: Self-contained HTML report with embedded failure screenshots. Healing log JSON. Published as CI/CD artifacts with 30-day retention.

components.label:
🎯 Jira / Azure DevOps
(Auto Bug Filing)
components.description: On test failure: REST API call creates a Jira bug or ADO work item with pre-populated fields. ADO Test Plans receives JUnit results via PublishTestResults task.
